note_text: Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 5.7x1.2x0.3cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 70% gran, 30% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Morales notified.
